pi_items.source: Verified against task description and export_result.sh script searching for 'Vertical_Standard*'
Verified against task description and verifier.py script using VLM to check for 'Portrait' orientation

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a new badge template file named 'Vertical_Standard' and setting its orientation to Portrait (vertical, taller than it is wide). No external datasets are used.
